languages.original_text: "I acted discreetly to ensure that my colleague would not discover my requisitioning of the reagents. That is, until work stopped in one of the capellae biologis, where there was a regrettable incident involving a group of servitors I had been experimenting on. Such a fuss over just a few controlled mutations!"

languages.text: "Я действовал осмотрительно, так что коллега не узнала о моей реквизиции реагентов, пока не застопорилась работа в одной из капелл биологис, где произошел прискорбный инцидент с группой {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}сервиторов{/g}, на которых я экспериментировал. Такой сырбор всего лишь из-за пары контролируемых мутаций!"

Such a fuss over just a few controlled mutations!"

"I acted discreetly to ensure that my colleague would not discover my requisitioning of the reagents. That is, until work stopped in one of the capellae biologis, where there was a regrettable incident involving a group of servitors I had been experimenting on. Such a fuss over just a few controlled mutations!"

"I acted discreetly to ensure that my colleague would not discover my requisitioning of the reagents. That is, until work stopped in one of the capellae biologis, where there was a regrettable incident involving a group of servitors I had been experimenting on. Such a fuss over just a few controlled mutations!"

languages.text: «Actué con discreción para asegurar que mi colega no descubría mi apropiación de los catalizadores... O así fue, hasta que todo trabajo se detuvo en una de las capellae biologis, donde se había producido un lamentable incidente con un grupo de {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servidores{/g} con los que había estado experimentando. ¡Tantas quejas por unas pocas mutaciones controladas!».
languages.original_text: "I acted discreetly to ensure that my colleague would not discover my requisitioning of the reagents. That is, until work stopped in one of the capellae biologis, where there was a regrettable incident involving a group of {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servitors{/g} I had been experimenting on. Such a fuss over just a few controlled mutations!"

traits.locale_text: «Actué con discreción para asegurar que mi colega no descubría mi apropiación de los catalizadores... O así fue, hasta que todo trabajo se detuvo en una de las capellae biologis, donde se había producido un lamentable incidente con un grupo de {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servidores{/g} con los que había estado experimentando. ¡Tantas quejas por unas pocas mutaciones controladas!».

languages.text: “我行事谨慎，以确保我那位同僚不会发现我私自取用了那些试剂。直到其中一个生物礼拜堂因一个不幸的意外停了工，那个意外跟我用来做实验的那批{g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}机仆{/g}有关。就那么几例可控的变异，居然闹出这么大动静！”
languages.original_text: "I acted discreetly to ensure that my colleague would not discover my requisitioning of the reagents. That is, until work stopped in one of the capellae biologis, where there was a regrettable incident involving a group of {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servitors{/g} I had been experimenting on. Such a fuss over just a few controlled mutations!"

traits.locale_text: “我行事谨慎，以确保我那位同僚不会发现我私自取用了那些试剂。直到其中一个生物礼拜堂因一个不幸的意外停了工，那个意外跟我用来做实验的那批{g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}机仆{/g}有关。就那么几例可控的变异，居然闹出这么大动静！”

languages.text: « J'ai agi avec la plus grande discrétion pour que ma collègue ne découvre pas ma réquisition des composants, jusqu'au jour où le travail a dû être interrompu dans l'une des capellae biologis suite à un regrettable incident avec un groupe de {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servitors{/g} sur lesquels j'expérimentais. Une réaction bien excessive pour à peine une poignée de mutations contrôlées ! »
languages.original_text: "I acted discreetly to ensure that my colleague would not discover my requisitioning of the reagents. That is, until work stopped in one of the capellae biologis, where there was a regrettable incident involving a group of {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servitors{/g} I had been experimenting on. Such a fuss over just a few controlled mutations!"

traits.locale_text: « J'ai agi avec la plus grande discrétion pour que ma collègue ne découvre pas ma réquisition des composants, jusqu'au jour où le travail a dû être interrompu dans l'une des capellae biologis suite à un regrettable incident avec un groupe de {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servitors{/g} sur lesquels j'expérimentais. Une réaction bien excessive pour à peine une poignée de mutations contrôlées ! »

languages.text: "Ich ging sehr diskret vor, um sicherzustellen, dass meine Kollegin meine Entnahme der Reagenzien nicht bemerkt. Dann wurde allerdings die Arbeit in einer der Capellae biologis aufgrund eines bedauerlichen Zwischenfalls mit einer Gruppe von {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}Servitoren{/g}, mit denen ich experimentiert hatte, eingestellt. So viel Wirbel wegen ein paar kontrollierter Mutationen!"
languages.original_text: "I acted discreetly to ensure that my colleague would not discover my requisitioning of the reagents. That is, until work stopped in one of the capellae biologis, where there was a regrettable incident involving a group of {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servitors{/g} I had been experimenting on. Such a fuss over just a few controlled mutations!"

traits.locale_text: "Ich ging sehr diskret vor, um sicherzustellen, dass meine Kollegin meine Entnahme der Reagenzien nicht bemerkt. Dann wurde allerdings die Arbeit in einer der Capellae biologis aufgrund eines bedauerlichen Zwischenfalls mit einer Gruppe von {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}Servitoren{/g}, mit denen ich experimentiert hatte, eingestellt. So viel Wirbel wegen ein paar kontrollierter Mutationen!"

languages.text: 「同僚に試薬の入手がばれないよう、慎重に行動した。というのも、カペラ・バイオロギスのひとつで、私が実験していたサーヴィターたちが巻き込まれる残念な事件が発生し、仕事がストップしてしまったからだ。たった数個の突然変異を制御しただけで、こんな大騒ぎになるなんて......」。
languages.original_text: "I acted discreetly to ensure that my colleague would not discover my requisitioning of the reagents. That is, until work stopped in one of the capellae biologis, where there was a regrettable incident involving a group of servitors I had been experimenting on. Such a fuss over just a few controlled mutations!"

languages.text: "Meslektaşım ayıraçları talep ettiğimi keşfetmesin diye sağduyulu davrandım. Sonrasında, üzerinde deneyler yaptığım bir grup {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}hizmetörün{/g} başına talihsiz bir olayın geldiği biyoloji şapellerinden birinde çalışma durdu. Birkaç kontrollü mutasyon için onca yaygara kopardı ya bir de!"
languages.original_text: "I acted discreetly to ensure that my colleague would not discover my requisitioning of the reagents. That is, until work stopped in one of the capellae biologis, where there was a regrettable incident involving a group of {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servitors{/g} I had been experimenting on. Such a fuss over just a few controlled mutations!"

Birkaç kontrollü mutasyon için onca yaygara kopardı ya bir de!"
